title: Blackhole 32x
description: New best Crystal PvP pack for 1.21!
body:
Best Crystal PvP Pack for 1.21!
  Includes:
    - Low Fire & No Fire Particles
    - Low Shield
    - No Explosion Particles
    - Mini Totems
    - No Pumpkin Blur

  Future Updates:
    - Fix Dark GUI
    - Trident
    - Firework Crossbow
    - Rework of Respawn Anchors
    - Black Fire
